name: readme-that-sells
description: README and launch-copy skill with an auditor for install friction and first-example clarity.

interface.shortDescription: Audit README clarity, install flow, and examples.
interface.longDescription: Write and audit developer-tool READMEs and launch copy. The skill focuses the first screen on what it is, whether it works, and how to try it.
defaultPrompt: Audit this README for first-use friction.
